summary: Extracted canvas creation into src/visual/scene.ts (initScene with container param, returns canvas + 2d context), created src/visual/resize.ts (attachResizeHandler with cleanup), created src/visual/renderLoop.ts (placeholder startLoop using requestAnimationFrame), updated main.ts as thin orchestrator, added #app position:fixed and canvas display:block to style.css, added jsdom canvas context mock in tests/setup.ts, and wrote 18 US-002 acceptance tests covering viewport fill, resize handling, no-scrollbar CSS, dark background, render loop, privacy, and main.ts integration.
